subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! My fingers tremble, my sight is enfeebled, my bones are shattered, my flesh melts away, and my blood is congealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد ارتعش اناملی و ضعف بصری و اندق عظمی و ذاب لحمی و انعقد دمی و
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for nearness to God
